sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40063" key="e)pillw/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλλ-ώπτω</orth>, <sense id="n40063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wink</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leer</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐξ ὀφρύος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.51c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
